Container.Name: WellWellWell
Container.Overview:
Local-first well water monitoring for a fixed UniFi G5 Pro camera.
This container grabs a frame from UniFi Protect over RTSP or a snapshot URL, crops the well marker region, detects the marker weight locally with OpenCV, stores readings in SQLite, and serves a dashboard.
Make the GitHub repository public so GitHub Container Registry can publish ghcr.io/OWNER/REPO:latest, then replace REPLACE_ME_GITHUB_OWNER and REPLACE_ME_GITHUB_REPO in this template before use.

Config.Name: AppData
Config.Description: Persistent data directory for SQLite and stored snapshots.

Config.Name: WebUI Port
Config.Description: Port for the WellWellWell dashboard and API.

Config.Name: WELL_DATA_DIR
Config.Description: Base data directory inside the container.

Config.Name: WELL_DB_PATH
Config.Description: SQLite database location.

Config.Name: WELL_SNAPSHOTS_DIR
Config.Description: Directory for raw, crop, and debug images.

Config.Name: WELL_ENABLE_COLLECTOR
Config.Description: Enable the built-in collector loop.

Config.Name: WELL_COLLECT_INTERVAL_MINUTES
Config.Description: Minutes between collection runs.

Config.Name: WELL_COLLECT_START_HOUR
Config.Description: Hour (0-23) when collection window opens.

Config.Name: WELL_COLLECT_END_HOUR
Config.Description: Hour (0-23) when collection window closes.

Config.Name: WELL_COLLECT_ON_STARTUP
Config.Description: Capture one reading immediately when the container starts (if within collection window).

Config.Name: CAMERA_RTSP_URL
Config.Description: UniFi Protect secure RTSP URL, for example rtsps://...:7441/... ?enableSrtp

Config.Name: CAMERA_SNAPSHOT_URL
Config.Description: Optional still-image snapshot URL. Leave blank when using RTSP.

Config.Name: FFMPEG_RTSP_TRANSPORT
Config.Description: Transport passed to ffmpeg for RTSP/RTSPS capture.

Config.Name: WELL_CROP
Config.Description: Crop rectangle in x,y,width,height format.

Config.Name: WELL_MARKER_HSV_LOWER
Config.Description: Lower HSV threshold for the marker.

Config.Name: WELL_MARKER_HSV_UPPER
Config.Description: Upper HSV threshold for the marker.

Config.Name: WELL_MIN_CONTOUR_AREA
Config.Description: Minimum contour area to consider as a marker candidate.

Config.Name: WELL_EXPECTED_MARKER_X
Config.Description: Optional expected X position of the marker within the cropped ROI.

Config.Name: WELL_EMPTY_Y
Config.Description: Marker Y position when the well is empty.

Config.Name: WELL_FULL_Y
Config.Description: Marker Y position when the well is full.

Config.Name: WELL_FULL_GALLONS
Config.Description: Approximate gallons when the well is full.

Config.Name: WELL_SAVE_DEBUG_IMAGES
Config.Description: Save annotated debug images to the data directory.

Config.Name: WELL_FLUSH_PASSWORD
Config.Description: Password required to use the Flush History button in the UI.
